request.description: PAYMENT.SALE.COMPLETED event notification payload (HTTPS POST body). The payload field schema is NOT documented on the provided pages.

responses.description: Receiver must respond with HTTP 200 or other 2xx status code. If the endpoint does not respond successfully, PayPal reattempts delivery up to 25 times over the course of 3 days.

missing: The JSON payload fields of PAYMENT.SALE.COMPLETED are not documented on the provided pages; the body is left unspecified rather than inferred.
summary: PAYMENT.SALE.COMPLETED webhook. Delivered as an HTTPS POST to your subscribed listener URL when a sale completes.
